action.reasoning: Observation: cam_unet_v3 finished training successfully and the immediate next step, per workflow, is hidden-set evaluation before making further changes. Analysis: v3 validation is close to v2, so only eval can tell whether the new edge-aware/larger model actually improves LPIPS; spending another iteration before measuring would be lower value. Decision: submit checkpoints/cam_unet_v3.pt with the current predict.py now.
